summary: CSV Export feature testing completed. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all components: Exports page with report type selection, date filters, escrow filter, status filter, export preview, and Generate CSV button. Export CSV buttons present on Audit Log and Transactions pages.

minor.issue: Fixed: Invalid date format was returning 500 instead of 400. Added date validation.

frontend_ui_tests.exports_page_loads: PASS - Exports & Reports page renders correctly
frontend_ui_tests.report_type_selection: PASS - Spend Activity and Audit Events cards present with data-testid
frontend_ui_tests.date_filters: PASS - Start date and end date inputs present
frontend_ui_tests.status_filter: PASS - Status filter present (for spend-activity report type)
frontend_ui_tests.export_preview: PASS - Shows record count, date range, report type
frontend_ui_tests.generate_csv_button: PASS - Generate CSV Export button present
frontend_ui_tests.audit_log_export_btn: PASS - Export CSV button on Audit Log page
frontend_ui_tests.transactions_export_btn: PASS - Export CSV button on Transactions page

features_verified.GET /api/v1/exports/summary: Returns preview counts for spend activity and audit events with date range
features_verified.GET /api/v1/exports/spend-activity: Returns CSV with proper headers, Content-Type: text/csv, Content-Disposition with filename
features_verified.GET /api/v1/exports/audit-events: Returns CSV with proper headers, ISO 8601 timestamps, event data
features_verified.Date range filters: start_date and end_date required, validated for ISO 8601 format
features_verified.Escrow filter: Optional escrow_id filter works on all endpoints
features_verified.Status filter: Optional status filter works on spend-activity endpoint
features_verified.Permission check: Only owner and finance_admin can export (401 for unauthenticated, 403 for unauthorized roles)
features_verified.CSV format: Comma-separated with proper escaping, headers match expected columns
features_verified.ISO 8601 dates: Timestamps in CSV use YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.sssZ format

critical_code_review_comments: Export routes properly implement permission check via requireExportPermission middleware
CSV escaping handles commas, quotes, and newlines correctly
ISO 8601 date formatting implemented via formatDateISO function
Filename generation uses org slug sanitization for safe filenames
Frontend ExportsPage properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Export buttons on Audit Log and Transactions pages link to Exports page with type parameter
seed_data_creation: Test org has 58 audit events and 0 spend requests (no escrow accounts created)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV Export feature fully tested. All 3 export endpoints working: GET /api/v1/exports/summary, GET /api/v1/exports/spend-activity, GET /api/v1/exports/audit-events. Frontend Exports page at /dashboard/exports has all required UI elements. Export CSV buttons present on Audit Log (/dashboard/audit-log) and Transactions (/dashboard/transactions) pages. Fixed minor bug: added date validation to /summary endpoint to return 400 instead of 500 for invalid dates.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Summary endpoint was returning 500 for invalid date format instead of 400
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added isNaN check for startDate and endDate after parsing, returns 400 with error message if invalid
